# Internal Tools

Internal tools are maintained in the `tools/` directory. Standalone scripts should be added to `tools/scripts/` and any tools that require dependencies should be added as a package with requirements listed in their respective project files:

```
tools/
├── scripts/
│   ├── script1.py
│   └── script2.ts
├── packaged-tool-1/
│   ├── pyproject.toml
│   └── src/
└── packaged-tool-2/
    ├── package.json
    └── src/
```
<!-- END MICROSOFT-FDE BLOCK -->
